1.note: Bootstrapped from an already-completed 8-parallel-pass audit; no new repository exploration performed.

2.note: Reviewed homepage/header/footer/nav, full CTA inventory across all 33 public pages, and content-accuracy spot-checks. Confirmed header/footer byte-identical across sample pages, no broken internal links, sitemap.html accurate, no staffing/credential exaggeration found. Added F037 (new); expanded F017 with full evidence table; re-confirmed F008/F009/F010/F018/F024/F029 still accurate.

3.note: Reviewed auth/session/token code, account.js, privacy.html, heroes-pricing.html. Confirmed F005/F015/F027 fixes and strengths still in place. Added F038 (password-reset never emails a link) and F039 (account-preference language stuck at 4 of 16). Re-verified F006/F007/F030 unchanged.

4.note: Reviewed documents.js, messages.js, favorites.js, notifications.js, content.js, website-designer.js (forms/files/email/PDF), and contact/intake form wiring. Confirmed F012/F013 fixes and ownership-check strengths hold. Added F040 (messages.js email HTML-injection); expanded F027 with a second occurrence in documents.js.

5.note: Reviewed Website Designer pricing/discount logic (client + server recompute), catalogs, pricing.html, heroes-pricing.html, payment.html, terms.html. No new findings -- re-verified F010, F011 (with exact terms-gate mechanism), F031, F032 (refined), F035 (clarified: constants are cross-checked, plain-text figures are not). All spot-checked dollar figures are currently mathematically correct.

6.note: Reviewed css/style.css notice tokens and RTL rules, js/cms.js image alt rendering, website-designer price ticker, intake.js form-error markup, nav dropdown ARIA, and all 16 i18n/*.json files for key parity. Confirmed F004 resolved; re-verified F016/F019/F020/F022/F023/F025/F026/F028 unchanged. Expanded F021 to include blog images. Added F041 (en.json 69% incomplete vs. the 15 real translation files, no runtime impact).

7.note: Read NEW_FUNCTIONS_README.md and all 9 REQUIREMENTS.md files in full. Built a value/risk/dependency gap matrix for all 9 candidate functions; confirmed the existing recommended build order independently. No new findings -- classification exercise only. Sharpened F033 with context: project-status and referral-program would both add further account-system surface on top of the existing open question.

8.note: Consolidated all 41 findings into a tiered fix-now/medium/low roadmap, grouped the 11 owner-decision items into direct questions for Dylan, restated Session 7's build order, and wrote handoff notes for any future implementation session. Audit complete -- no further sessions defined.

findingIdRange.note: IDs are derived from real findings only; there is no predetermined catalog size such as F001-F060.

F001.summary: USS Antietam hull number CG-64 -> CG-54

F005.summary: admin-images.js authorization gap (GET checked auth only, not role)

F006.summary: Privacy Policy under-discloses actual data collection
F006.resolutionNote: Fixed: Privacy Policy §1 now discloses accounts, documents, messages, favorites, notifications, Website Designer uploads, and IP addresses; translated into all 16 languages. Dylan should still review final wording before this is considered final.

F007.summary: Resend not named as a sub-processor in Privacy Policy
F007.resolutionNote: Fixed: Privacy Policy §3 now names Resend as the transactional email sub-processor

F008.summary: Gallery empty with full nav prominence

F009.summary: Booking non-functional with full nav prominence

F011.summary: Square terms-gate bypassable via direct link

F012.summary: Website Designer uploads had no server-side MIME validation

F013.summary: Website Designer backend trusted client-submitted price totals

F016.summary: Zero automated tests anywhere in the repository
F016.resolutionNote: Fixed: node:test coverage added for recomputeEstimate/priceMismatchFlag and a static consistency check of heroes-pricing.html's hand-typed Heroes Discount prices

F017.summary: 14+ distinct CTA phrasings for one conceptual action

F018.resolutionNote: Fixed: intake copy replaced "type 4" with N/A across en + 15 langs

F019.summary: Testimonials/Portfolio meta description will go stale once real content exists
F019.resolutionNote: Fixed: js/cms.js updates meta/og:description once portfolio/testimonials get real content

F020.summary: Identical LocalBusiness JSON-LD everywhere; no Service/FAQPage/Article schema
F020.resolutionNote: Fixed: Service JSON-LD on the 5 service pages; full FAQPage JSON-LD on faq.html

F021.summary: Portfolio, blog-card, and blog-post renderers all hardcode alt="" despite title/description being available; Gallery's renderer does this correctly
F021.resolutionNote: Fixed: real alt text for blog/portfolio card images in js/cms.js

F022.summary: No aria-live on Website Designer price ticker
F022.resolutionNote: Fixed: aria-live/aria-atomic added to the Website Designer price ticker

F023.summary: RTL sets dir but layout doesn't mirror
F023.resolutionNote: Fixed: [dir="rtl"] CSS override block for custom bullet markers, text-align, and margins that carry real directional meaning

F024.summary: Patch Notes reads as raw engineering changelog

F025.summary: logo-full.png is 156KB, large for a logo
F025.resolutionNote: Fixed: logo-full.png recompressed 157KB -> 79KB (palette quantization, imperceptible diff, PNG format kept for crawler compatibility)

F026.summary: Individual invalid form fields lack aria-invalid/aria-describedby (top-level error summary does correctly carry role=alert)
F026.resolutionNote: Fixed: per-field aria-invalid/aria-describedby on contact.html and intake.js form validation

F027.summary: Rate limiter TOCTOU race; SVG not excluded from admin MIME allowlist in admin-images.js and documents.js (fix pattern already exists in website-designer.js's isRecognizedImage())
F027.resolutionNote: Fixed: shared magic-byte file-signature sniffing (_lib/file_signatures.js) in admin-images.js and documents.js; TOCTOU limitation documented as accepted (no atomic primitive in @netlify/blobs 8.2.0)

F028.summary: No aria-haspopup on nav dropdown toggles
F028.resolutionNote: Fixed: aria-haspopup added to language/services/resources nav dropdowns across all 33 public pages

F032.summary: Subscription plan scope (edits, hours, carryover) undefined

F033.summary: Account-system feature scope and open-registration policy

F034.summary: Version string hardcoded across 33 footers, no shared source
F034.resolutionNote: Fixed: js/site-version.js is now the single source of truth for the footer "Website Version" string across all 33 pages

F035.summary: Base prices and Heroes-discount amounts duplicated across multiple files as plain text with no automatic cross-check (contrast the Website Designer's pricing constants, which are duplicated but auto-cross-checked via priceMismatchFlag)
F035.resolutionNote: Partially fixed: Website Designer client-side base price now derived from catalog JSON instead of hand-typed; remaining hand-typed Heroes Discount prices on heroes-pricing.html now guarded by an automated test (F016) instead of a runtime rewrite

F036.summary: Founder biography duplicated across 5 locations x 16 languages

F037.summary: Homepage hero 'Get a free quote' CTA links to contact.html, contradicting that page's own copy which directs quote-seekers to intake.html
F037.resolutionNote: Fixed: homepage CTA now points to intake.html

F038.summary: Password-reset request never emails the reset link; only email-verification actually calls sendEmail()
F038.resolutionNote: Fixed: password-reset request now emails a real reset link (page-aware admin/myaccount routing)

F039.summary: Account-preference language list hardcoded to 4 of 16 real supported languages
F039.resolutionNote: Fixed: account.js VALID_LANGUAGES and myaccount.html LANGUAGES expanded to all 16 real languages

F040.summary: messages.js embeds message body/sender name unescaped into outbound HTML email, unlike the esc() pattern used elsewhere in the codebase
F040.resolutionNote: Fixed: messages.js HTML-escapes message content before building the outbound email

F041.summary: i18n/en.json has 466 of the 1,496 real translation keys (69% missing) -- stale relative to the 15 real language files, which are all identical to each other; no runtime impact since English never fetches en.json
F041.resolutionNote: Fixed: i18n/en.json regenerated from 466 to 1,496 keys, exact parity with all 15 real translation files

implementationPasses.note: Post-audit engineering fix pass covering every open, engineering-only finding from the Tier 1-3 roadmap in 08_FINAL_AUDIT_AND_ROADMAP.md except F036 (Info, founder-bio duplication -- not in scope this pass). Resolved: F006, F007, F016, F018, F019, F020, F021, F022, F023, F025, F026, F027, F028, F034, F035 (partial -- see its resolutionNote), F037, F038, F039, F040, F041. Commits 98225ce..8caaae6. The 11 Owner-Decision findings (F008-F011, F017, F024, F029-F033) were deliberately left untouched per 00_AUDIT_CONTROL.md's ground rule that Owner-Decision findings should not be silently implemented -- these still need Dylan's direct input.
